meta.name: description
meta.content: EduMaster is a mobile-first SSC JE / RRB JE preparation platform with courses, mock tests, daily quiz, live classes, analytics, and AI coaching.
meta.title: EduMaster | SSC JE & RRB JE Prep Platform

div.class: relative mx-auto flex min-h-screen max-w-7xl items-center justify-center px-4 py-8 sm:px-6 lg:px-10
w-full max-w-5xl overflow-hidden rounded-[36px] border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,19,31,0.96),rgba(15,19,31,0.92))] shadow-[0_40px_140px_rgba(2,6,23,0.65)] backdrop-blur-2xl

section.class: relative border-b border-white/8 p-6 sm:p-8 lg:border-b-0 lg:border-r lg:border-white/8 lg:p-10

div.class: flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/12 bg-white/8

div.p: SSC JE and RRB JE premium access

h1.class: mt-8 text-3xl font-semibold leading-tight text-white sm:mt-10 sm:text-5xl

div.h1: Login or sign up to continue
div.p: Secure learner access with single-device protection, persistent sign-in, and quick entry to your prep dashboard.

div.class: mt-8 hidden rounded-[28px] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] p-5 sm:block
hidden rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 p-3 sm:flex
mt-7 flex rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-black/25 p-1

button.class: flex-1 rounded-full px-4 py-3 text-sm font-semibold transition bg-[linear-gradient(90deg,#249bff,#3163ff,#f0489f)] text-white shadow-[0_12px_28px_rgba(49,99,255,0.32)]
flex-1 rounded-full px-4 py-3 text-sm font-semibold transition text-slate-400

input.class: mt-2 w-full rounded-[20px] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-4 py-4 text-white outline-none transition placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:border-sky-400/70
mt-2 w-full rounded-[20px] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-4 py-4 text-white outline-none transition placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:border-sky-400/70

button.class: flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-[20px] bg-[linear-gradient(90deg,#249bff,#3163ff,#f0489f)] px-5 py-4 font-semibold text-white shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(49,99,255,0.34)] transition hover:brightness-110 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60

div.class: mt-7 rounded-[24px] border border-white/10 bg-black/20 p-5

div.div: Stay logged in after refresh or PC restart.
If your account is active elsewhere, we show a takeover screen before login continues.
